title: Very Blue Stair Mod
description: Adds the very blue stair into minecraft!
body: Adds a very blue stair to minecraft, as suggested at [https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/13129756864141-We-need-a-blue-very-blue-stair](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/13129756864141-We-need-a-blue-very-blue-stair)
